title: Safety
description:
Relates to the prevention of harm to the environment, users, or the system itself during operation. It is critical in sensitive systems.
[ul]
[b]Operational constraint[/b]: keeps operation within safe limits.
[b]Risk identification[/b]: detects dangerous situations.
[b]Fail safe[/b]: enters safe state upon failure.
[b]Hazard warning[/b]: alerts about risks.
[b]Safe integration[/b]: maintains safety when integrating systems.[/ul]
